targets.rawSql:
WITH per_run_meta AS (
  SELECT
    COALESCE(crate_code, crate_version) AS crate_code,
    run_id,
    MAX(ts_ms) AS last_ts_ms
  FROM packet_parse_events
  WHERE COALESCE(crate_code, crate_version) IN (${crate_code_a:sqlstring}, ${crate_code_b:sqlstring})
    AND pcap = '$pcap'
  GROUP BY COALESCE(crate_code, crate_version), run_id
),
last_runs AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (crate_code) crate_code, run_id
  FROM per_run_meta
  ORDER BY crate_code, last_ts_ms DESC
),
per_run AS (
  SELECT
    COALESCE(e.crate_code, e.crate_version) AS crate_code,
    e.run_id,
    ROUND(AVG(l2_ns))::bigint AS l2_ns,
    ROUND(AVG(l3_ns))::bigint AS l3_ns,
    ROUND(AVG(l4_ns))::bigint AS l4_ns,
    ROUND(AVG(l7_ns))::bigint AS l7_ns,
    ROUND(AVG(duration_ns))::bigint AS total_ns
  FROM packet_parse_events e
  JOIN last_runs r
    ON r.crate_code = COALESCE(e.crate_code, e.crate_version)
   AND r.run_id = e.run_id
  WHERE e.pcap = '$pcap'
  GROUP BY COALESCE(e.crate_code, e.crate_version), e.run_id
),
comparisons AS (
  SELECT
    'L2' AS layer,
    MAX(CASE WHEN crate_code = ${crate_code_a:sqlstring} THEN l2_ns END) AS a_ns,
    MAX(CASE WHEN crate_code = ${crate_code_b:sqlstring} THEN l2_ns END) AS b_ns
  FROM per_run
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    'L3' AS layer,
    MAX(CASE WHEN crate_code = ${crate_code_a:sqlstring} THEN l3_ns END) AS a_ns,
    MAX(CASE WHEN crate_code = ${crate_code_b:sqlstring} THEN l3_ns END) AS b_ns
  FROM per_run
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    'L4' AS layer,
    MAX(CASE WHEN crate_code = ${crate_code_a:sqlstring} THEN l4_ns END) AS a_ns,
    MAX(CASE WHEN crate_code = ${crate_code_b:sqlstring} THEN l4_ns END) AS b_ns
  FROM per_run
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    'L7' AS layer,
    MAX(CASE WHEN crate_code = ${crate_code_a:sqlstring} THEN l7_ns END) AS a_ns,
    MAX(CASE WHEN crate_code = ${crate_code_b:sqlstring} THEN l7_ns END) AS b_ns
  FROM per_run
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    'TOTAL' AS layer,
    MAX(CASE WHEN crate_code = ${crate_code_a:sqlstring} THEN total_ns END) AS a_ns,
    MAX(CASE WHEN crate_code = ${crate_code_b:sqlstring} THEN total_ns END) AS b_ns
  FROM per_run
)
SELECT
  layer,
  a_ns AS crate_a_ns,
  b_ns AS crate_b_ns,
  (b_ns - a_ns) AS delta_ns,
  ROUND(((b_ns - a_ns)::numeric / NULLIF(a_ns, 0)) * 100, 2) AS delta_pct
FROM comparisons
ORDER BY CASE layer WHEN 'L2' THEN 1 WHEN 'L3' THEN 2 WHEN 'L4' THEN 3 WHEN 'L7' THEN 4 ELSE 5 END;
